heading_content_part: However, we will normally collect personal information from you only (i) where we need the personal information to perform a contract with you, (ii) where the processing is in our legitimate interests and not overridden by your rights, or (iii) where we have your consent to do so. decoder_heading: How We Collect Your Personal Information

decoder_heading: How We Collect Your Personal Information
ident_heading: How We Collect Your Personal Information
heading_content_part: If we collect and use your personal information in reliance on our legitimate interests (or those of any third party), this interest will normally be to operate our platform and communicating with you as necessary to provide our services to you and for our legitimate commercial interest, for instance, when responding to your queries, improving our platform, undertaking marketing, or for the purposes of detecting or preventing illegal activities. We may have other legitimate interests and if appropriate we will make clear to you at the relevant time what those legitimate interests are.

How We Collect Your Personal InformationWhen you use the services of Mobvoi, we ask for and collect the following your personal information.3.1

decoder_heading: Information that you provide voluntarily
ident_heading: Information that you provide voluntarily
heading_content_part: Information that you provide voluntarilyFor using Mobvoi services, we may ask you to provide personal information voluntarily. The personal information that you are asked to provide, and the reasons why you are asked to provide it, will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide your personal information. You do not have to provide your personal information to Mobvoi, but in some cases, the non-provision of certain personal information will cause the inability to provide you with some related products or services.

decoder_heading: Information that is necessary for the use of the Mobvoi services
ident_heading: Information that is necessary for the use of the Mobvoi services
heading_content_part: Information that is necessary for the use of the Mobvoi servicesThis information is necessary for the adequate performance of the services provided by Mobvoi. Without it, we may not be able to provide you with all the services requested by you.Account Information.When you sign up a Mobvoi account, we require certain information such as name, phone number and/or email address, contact information.

decoder_heading: Personal Information you choose to share with us
ident_heading: Personal Information you choose to share with us
heading_content_part: Personal Information you choose to share with usYou may choose to provide us with additional personal information in order to have a better user experience when using services of Mobvoi. This additional information will be processed based on your consent.We kindly remind you that when you use TicWatch S&E series, such information will be provided to Wear OS by Google and you will be informed in time when Wear OS by Google and other Google apps ask for your personal information.

decoder_heading: Additional profile information
ident_heading: Additional profile information
heading_content_part: Additional profile information.You may choose to provide additional information as part of your Mobvoi profile (such as gender, photo, nickname, Date of Birth, common address, and mailing address).

decoder_heading: Your physiological information
ident_heading: Your physiological information
heading_content_part: Your physiological information.You may choose to provide your information on physiological feature, sports and health when you using the Fitness app, Health app, Heart Rate app, Step Ranking app and some dial plates, such us your height, weight, step number, calorie consumed, sports mode (i.e. running or walking) and walking distance.Reminder on SENSITIVE PERSONAL INFORMATION.

decoder_heading: Your physiological information
ident_heading: Your physiological information
heading_content_part: Some of the personal information that you provide may include sensitive personal information, such as your personal health information; such information is more strictly regulated than other types of personal information. Before providing any “sensitive” personal information to us, please clearly consider whether it is appropriate.

decoder_heading: Your physiological information

heading_content_part: You agree that your sensitive personal information may be processed in accordance with the purposes and methods described in this Privacy Policy. You of course have the rights to control, please seeSection 7 Your Rights to Manage the Personal Information.

heading_content_part: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of MobvoiWhen you use the services of Mobvoi, we automatically collect the following your information from your device. In some countries, including countries in EEA, this information may be considered personal information under applicable data protection laws.

decoder_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
ident_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
heading_content_part: Specifically, the information we collect automatically may include information like your IP address, device type, unique device identification numbers, browser-type, broad geographic location (e.g. country or city-level location), contact information and other technical information. We may also collect information about how your device has interacted with our website, including the pages accessed and links clicked.

decoder_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
ident_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
heading_content_part: Collecting these types of information enables us to better understand the users. We use this information to analyse your preference, habit and location, etc. so as to provide more tailored services to you (e.g. accurately record your movement trajectory and provide advertising and promotion information that better meets your needs).

decoder_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
ident_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
heading_content_part: This information is necessary for the adequate performance of our contractual obligation to enable us to comply with legal obligations and given our legitimate interest in being able to provide and improve the functionalities of services of Mobvoi.Location Information.

decoder_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
ident_heading: Information we automatically collect from your use of the Services of Mobvoi
heading_content_part: The location of the device when you are using the products of Mobvoi, such as GPS, wifi, compass, accelerometer or other sensors used by your mobile devices. Internet protocol address (IP address) of the device or Internet service you used to access the services of Mobvoi. We will ask you to choose the applications for which you want to enable location services. In the device settings menu, you can disable the location permissions of specific services to reject sharing your location information.

decoder_heading: Information that we obtain from third party

heading_content_part: The types of information we collect from third parties include account information and we use the information we receive from these third parties to create/sign up Mobvoi account and maintain and improve the accuracy of the records we hold about you.These third parties will have their own rules about the collection, use and disclose of information. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.3.4

decoder_heading: Collection and use of non-identifiable data
ident_heading: Collection and use of non-identifiable data
heading_content_part: Collection and use of non-identifiable dataNon-identifiable data refers to data that cannot be used to identify an individual. Examples of non-identifiable data include statistics on website visits, application downloads, and product sales volume. Mobvoi will collect statistics information to understand how users use our products and services. By doing so, we can improve our services to better meet your requirements.

decoder_heading: Collection and use of non-identifiable data
ident_heading: Collection and use of non-identifiable data
heading_content_part: We keep your personal information and non-identifiable data separate, and use each independently. Circumstances may arise where Mobvoi collects, uses, discloses, and transfers non-identifiable data for other purposes at our own discretion.4.

decoder_heading: How We Use Your Personal Information
ident_heading: How We Use Your Personal Information
heading_content_part: How We Use Your Personal InformationWe use, store, and process your information, including your personal information, to provide, understand, improve, and develop our Services of Mobvoi, create and maintain a trusted and safer environment and comply with our legal obligations.

decoder_heading: How We Use Your Personal Information
ident_heading: How We Use Your Personal Information
heading_content_part: If you use a smart watch when you go out and ask, you will provide us with your height, weight, age, number of steps, calories burned, your exercise mode (for example, running or walking), and distance traveled. Regarding health data, you will provide us with your heart rate, body temperature, blood oxygen, respiration rate, HRV, sleep information, etc.4.1

decoder_heading: Provide, improve and develop Mobvoi Services

heading_content_part: Provide, improve and develop Mobvoi ServicesFor providing the services of Mobvoi (and specific function within services of Mobvoi). For example, you can make Bluetooth calls in the software of Mobvoi and display relevant contents based on your location.For providing logistics delivery, order inquiry, after-sales service relating to services as you purchased our products via online store.

decoder_heading: Provide, improve and develop Mobvoi Services
ident_heading: Provide, improve and develop Mobvoi Services

The collected personal information when you use Mobvoi devices can be used in another Mobvoi device to provide you with specific content. You can also request us, from time to time, to transfer or transmit the stored personal information between Mobvoi services (if available).

decoder_heading: Provide, improve and develop Mobvoi Services

heading_content_part: We process this information given our legitimate interest in improving Mobvoi services with it, and where it is necessary for the adequate performance of the contract with you.4.2

decoder_heading: How We Protect Your Personal Information

heading_content_part: How We Protect Your Personal Information6.1

decoder_heading: We have taken the safety protection measures which conform to the industry standard to protect your personal information that we collect and process about you
ident_heading: We have taken the safety protection measures which conform to the industry standard to protect your personal information that we collect and process about you
heading_content_part: We have taken the safety protection measures which conform to the industry standard to protect your personal information that we collect and process about you, and prevent data from suffering from unauthorized visit, public disclosure, usage, modification, damage or loss. The measures we use are designed to provide a level of security appropriate to the risk of processing your personal information. For example, when you exchange data (such as credit card information) between your browser and “service”, it is protected by SSL encryption; We provide Https-safe browsing way for the website appeared in the homepage of the Privacy Policy; We use the encryption technology to ensure the confidentiality of data; We use the reliant protection mechanism to prevent data from suffering from malicious attack; We deploy the access control mechanism to ensure only authorized person can access the personal information; And we hold the safety and privacy protection training course to strengthen the recognition of our personnel about the importance of personal information protection.

decoder_heading: We have taken the safety protection measures which conform to the industry standard to protect your personal information that we collect and process about you
ident_heading: We have taken the safety protection measures which conform to the industry standard to protect your personal information that we collect and process about you

decoder_heading: In the case of a personal information breach, Mobvoi as data controller is under a legal obligation to notify the supervisory authority without undue delay
ident_heading: In the case of a personal information breach, Mobvoi as data controller is under a legal obligation to notify the supervisory authority without undue delay
heading_content_part: In the case of a personal information breach, Mobvoi as data controller is under a legal obligation to notify the supervisory authority without undue delay (normally within 72 hours) unless the breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of the individuals.6.3

decoder_heading: We take all reasonable and feasible measures to ensure not to collect irrelevant personal information
ident_heading: We take all reasonable and feasible measures to ensure not to collect irrelevant personal information
heading_content_part: We take all reasonable and feasible measures to ensure not to collect irrelevant personal information. We will only reserve your personal information to achieve the purpose stated in the Privacy Policy within the period required, unless such period need permitted by laws to be extended.6.4

decoder_heading: The internet is not an absolutely secure environment, and the email, instant messaging and other forms of communication with other Mobvoi users are not encrypted
ident_heading: The internet is not an absolutely secure environment, and the email, instant messaging and other forms of communication with other Mobvoi users are not encrypted
heading_content_part: The internet is not an absolutely secure environment, and the email, instant messaging and other forms of communication with other Mobvoi users are not encrypted. We therefore strongly recommend that you do not to send the confidential information in this way. Please use a complicated password to secure your account.6.5

decoder_heading: We will make our best effort to ensure the security of any information you send as the internet environment is not absolutely secure
ident_heading: We will make our best effort to ensure the security of any information you send as the internet environment is not absolutely secure
heading_content_part: We will make our best effort to ensure the security of any information you send as the internet environment is not absolutely secure. In the unfortunate event of a personal information security incident, we will promptly inform you in accordance with the requirements of laws and regulations, including the basic situation of such incident, its possible impact, the treatment measures we have taken or will take, suggestions on how to prevent and reduce risks and remedial measures for you, etc. We will timely inform you of the relevant situation of events by E-mail, letter, telephone and pushing notice. If there is any difficult to inform the personal information owner individually, we will take reasonable and effective ways to issue an announcement. Meanwhile, in accordance with the requirements of the regulatory authorities, we will actively report such authorities the development of the personal information security events.

decoder_heading: We will make our best effort to ensure the security of any information you send as the internet environment is not absolutely secure

In addition you will have the right to data portability.7.1

decoder_heading: Right of access

heading_content_part: Right of accessYou have right to access your personal information except for prohibited by laws and regulations. If you want to exercise the access right, you can access it per se in following ways:a)Account information-- you can access or edit the personal data information and payment information in your account, change your password, add safety information or close your account, etc. You can perform such operations by accessing 【Mobvoi App → User Center】.b)Search information

decoder_heading: Right of access

decoder_heading: Right of access
ident_heading: Right of access
heading_content_part: We will provide other personal information to you that arises from your use of our products or services, only if it is not overmuch time-consuming. If you want to exercise data access, please send an email to support@mobvoi.com.7.2

decoder_heading: Right to rectification

heading_content_part: Right to rectificationIf you find there is an inaccurate or incomplete personal information when we are processing your personal information, you have right to require us to correct it. You can correct it on your own through 【Mobvoi App → User Center】.If you cannot correct this personal information through above links, you can send E-mail to support@mobvoi.com to file a correction request. We will process your correction request without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request.

decoder_heading: Right to erasure ('Right to be Forgotten')
ident_heading: Right to erasure ('Right to be Forgotten')
heading_content_part: Right to erasure ('Right to be Forgotten')In the following circumstances, you can request us to delete your personal information:a) If we process personal information in violation of laws and regulations;b) If we collect and use your personal information without your consent;c) If we process personal information in violation of our agreement;d) If you no longer use our products and services, or you cancel your Mobvoi account;e) If Mobvoi no longer serves you.

decoder_heading: Right to erasure ('Right to be Forgotten')
ident_heading: Right to erasure ('Right to be Forgotten')
heading_content_part: You can make a request to erasure your personal information by sending E-mail to support@mobvoi.com and we will reply your request without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request.When you delete the information from Mobvoi services, we may not immediately delete the corresponding information from the backup system; we will yet delete such information when the backup system is scheduled on updates.7.4

decoder_heading: In addition, you can object to processing of your personal information, ask us to restrict processing of your personal information or request portability of your personal information

Again, you can exercise these rights by sending E-mail to support@mobvoi.com and we will reply your request without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request.7.5

decoder_heading: Change the scope of your authorization and consent
ident_heading: Change the scope of your authorization and consent
heading_content_part: Change the scope of your authorization and consentEach business function requires some basic personal information to be completed (seeSection 3of this Privacy Policy). You may give or withdraw your consent at any time of the collection and use of your personal information other than minimums use/set. You can perform such operations by accessing 【Enter personal phone settings → select to close the services of Mobvoi】.

decoder_heading: Change the scope of your authorization and consent
ident_heading: Change the scope of your authorization and consent
heading_content_part: When you withdraw your consent, we will not process the corresponding personal information. However, your decision to withdraw consent will not affect personal information processing based on your previous authorization, nor will it affect processing of your personal information conducted in reliance on lawful processing grounds other than consent.7.6

decoder_heading: Right to out-put of marketing communications
ident_heading: Right to out-put of marketing communications
heading_content_part: Right to out-put of marketing communicationswe send you at any time.You can exercise this right by clicking on the “unsubscribe” link in the marketing e-mails we send you.  To opt-out of other forms of marketing (such as postal marketing or telemarketing), then please contact us using the contact details provided under the ",How to contact us".7.7

decoder_heading: Right to data portability
ident_heading: Right to data portability
heading_content_part: Right to data portabilityYou have the right to obtain your personal information copy. You can perform such operations by sending E-mail to support@mobvoi.com, and we will process your request without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request.If technology measures permit, such as the data interface is compatible, we can also send a copy of your personal information to your designated third party directly at your request.7.8

decoder_heading: Right to complaint
ident_heading: Right to complaint
heading_content_part: Right to complaintYou have right to compliant a data protection authority about our collection and use of your personal information. For more information, please contact your local data protection authority7.9 How we respond to your requestTo protect the security, you may need to provide the request in written or in other ways for your identity verification, then we can proceed. For your request, we will reply without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request.

decoder_heading: Right to complaint
ident_heading: Right to complaint
heading_content_part: In principle, we do not charge of your reasonable requests. However, we will charge a certain amount of cost for the requests that are repeated multiple times and exceed reasonable limits. We may reject requests if it is unreasonably repeated or requires overmuch time-consuming technical approach (such as a need to develop new systems or fundamentally change current practices) or poses a risk to the others legal rights and interests or is unrealistic (such as involving information stored on backup tapes/hard disks).

decoder_heading: Notices and other types of communications
ident_heading: Notices and other types of communications
heading_content_part: Notices and other types of communicationsWhen you use the Mobvoi service, we can use your personal information to send emails, text messages, or push notifications to your device. If you do not wish to receive these newsletters, you can choose to have the "Cancellation Notice" (if any) on your device or contact us at support@mobvoi.com .8.2

decoder_heading: Service-related announcements
ident_heading: Service-related announcements
heading_content_part: Service-related announcementsWe may from time to time send you service-related announcements in necessary (for example, when we suspend the Mobvoi service for maintenance). You are not entitled to cancel such announcements as it is service-related but not promotion-related.9.

ident_heading: Third Party Partners & Integrations
heading_content_part: Third Party Partners & Integrations

decoder_heading: Mobvoi services may contain links to third party websites or services
ident_heading: Mobvoi services may contain links to third party websites or services
heading_content_part: Mobvoi services may contain links to third party websites or services, such as third party integrations, co-branded services, or third party-branded services ("Third Party Partners"). Mobvoi doesn’t own or control these Third Party Partners and when you interact with them, you may be providing information directly to the Third Party Partner, Mobvoi, or both. These Third Party Partners will have their own rules about the collection, use, and disclosure of information. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of the other websites you visit.

decoder_heading: Related system permissions
ident_heading: Related system permissions
heading_content_part: Related system permissions

decoder_heading: Related system permissions
ident_heading: Related system permissions
heading_content_part: If your device is an iPhone, when you need to display the sports health data from Mobvoi in the Health app of your iPhone, the system will request your authorization to write the data into the Health Kit. If you do not agree or cancel the authorization, it will not be the corresponding data will be displayed again, but it will not affect your use of other functions of Mobvoi products and services. We will not share or sell the data obtained from HeathKit to any third party, including advertisers and other agencies, nor use HeathKit's information for marketing, advertising, data mining or other similar purposes.

ident_heading: We retain personal information we collect from you where we have an ongoing legitimate business need to do so
heading_content_part: We retain personal information we collect from you where we have an ongoing legitimate business need to do so (for example, to provide you with a service you have requested or to comply with applicable legal, tax or accounting requirements).When we have no ongoing legitimate business need to process your personal information, we will either delete or anonymise it or, if this is not possible (for example, because your personal information has been stored in backup archives), then we will securely store your personal information and isolate it from any further processing until deletion is possible.

heading_content_part: Global Operations and International Data Transfers

decoder_heading: We operate globally to bring you our services
ident_heading: We operate globally to bring you our services
heading_content_part: We operate globally to bring you our services. Where the laws of your country allow you to do so, you authorise us to transfer, store, and use your personal data in the United States, Mainland China and any other country where we operate. In some of the countries to which we transfer personal data, the privacy and data protection laws and rules regarding when government authorities may access data may vary from those of your country.

decoder_heading: We operate globally to bring you our services
ident_heading: We operate globally to bring you our services
heading_content_part: Specifically, our servers are located in Mainland China, and our group companies and third party service providers and partners operate around the world. This means that when we collect your personal information we may process it in any of these countries.

decoder_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
ident_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
heading_content_part: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws, contractual obligations placed on the recipient of the data (model clauses may be requested by inquiry as described below), or EU-US and Swiss-US Privacy Shield principles.

decoder_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
ident_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
heading_content_part: Mobvoi has implemented global privacy practices for processing personal information protected under various data protection laws. Mobvoi transfers personal information between the countries in which we operate in accordance with the standards and conditions of applicable data protection laws, including standards and conditions related to security and processing.

decoder_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
ident_heading: When we transfer personal data outside of the EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection for the rights of data subjects based on the adequacy of the receiving country’s data protection laws
heading_content_part: Our Standard Contractual Clauses can be provided on request by sending email to support@mobvoi.com.  We have implemented similar appropriate safeguards with our third party service providers and partners and further details can be provided upon request.12.

decoder_heading: How We Dispose the Personal Information of Children
ident_heading: How We Dispose the Personal Information of Children
heading_content_part: How We Dispose the Personal Information of Children13.1

decoder_heading: Mobvoi's personal and home products are intended for adults
ident_heading: Mobvoi's personal and home products are intended for adults
heading_content_part: Mobvoi's personal and home products are intended for adults. However, for the use of Mobvoi products and services by children, we are fully aware of the importance of taking extra preventive measures to protect privacy and security. Mobvoi identifies whether data subjects are children based on the age of majority defined by laws of the local countries and regions.13.2

decoder_heading: When children's personal information is collected based on the consent of the holders of parental responsibility, we will only use or disclose the information as permitted by law
ident_heading: When children's personal information is collected based on the consent of the holders of parental responsibility, we will only use or disclose the information as permitted by law
heading_content_part: When children's personal information is collected based on the consent of the holders of parental responsibility, we will only use or disclose the information as permitted by law, explicitly consented to by the holders of parental responsibility, or required for protecting the children. Holders of parental responsibility who need to access, modify, or delete the personal information of their children and people under guardianship can contact us via the channels provided in "IV. How Mobvoi Protects Your Personal information."

decoder_heading: When children's personal information is collected based on the consent of the holders of parental responsibility, we will only use or disclose the information as permitted by law

heading_content_part: If Mobvoi accidentally collects children's personal information without obtaining consent from provable holders of parental responsibility, Mobvoi will delete the information as soon as possible after becoming aware of it.14.

decoder_heading: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time
ident_heading: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time
heading_content_part: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make changes to this Privacy Policy, we will post the revised Privacy Policy on the website and update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this Privacy Policy.14.2 We will give you the opportunity to review the revised Policy before you choose to continue using our Services. If you disagree with the revised Privacy Policy, you may cancel your Account. If you do not cancel your Account before the date the revised Privacy Policy becomes effective, your continued access to or use of the Mobvoi services will be subject to the revised Privacy Policy.
